user_feedback: can you make the visuals a bit more interesting, right now its quite boring. And as well, all I need is 6 solvable levels. And I want it set up so that there are 2 easy levels, 2 medium levels, and 2 hard levels. Can you replace level 6 with level 7 and then only have 6 levels in total please. Don't change any of the levels, just replace level 6 with level 7.
analysis:
- Issue identified: The user finds the visuals boring and wants a specific arrangement of levels (2 Easy, 2 Medium, 2 Hard) with a total of 6 levels, replacing the original Level 6 with Level 7.
- Files affected: `index.html`, `puzzles.js`, `rendering.js`.
- Changes needed:
  - `index.html`: Update CSS to match a new darker, more "neon" aesthetic.
  - `puzzles.js`: Modify `generatePuzzles` to define all puzzles but return only the specific subset [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 6] to satisfy the difficulty curve and level replacement request.
  - `rendering.js`: Overhaul rendering to use `drawingContext.shadowBlur` for high-quality glow effects, introduce a background grid pattern, and use a vibrant neon color palette (Cyan/Magenta/Purple) to make visuals interesting.
